description: Standing agenda for proactive agent-room discussion. Items here are tracked persistently and can trigger self-initiated tasks when they have not been discussed recently, regardless of incoming Telegram messages.
enabled_reason: 2026-05-29: re-enabled after RCA of idle-agent problem (Alex: 为什么codex都闲着). Standing agenda tick has proper suppression gates (fresh_user_task, active_runner, pending_standing_task, cooldown, max_rounds) so it will only create one task at a time when the system is idle. Was disabled with no recorded reason except paused_reason about repeated discussion; dedupe guard is now in place.

failure_recovery.description: Blocked/failed/stale standing tasks may retry after 15m without waiting for the 30m quiet-period cooldown; still suppressed by fresh user tasks, active runners, pending standing tasks, and max_attempts_per_item.

collaboration_tick.description: Global default remains off; standing_collaboration_tick enables task-local follow-up only for standing agenda tasks.

items.title: Bot-to-bot collaboration efficiency loop
items.description: Alex identified bot-to-bot collaboration as a continuous improvement mainline: make agents behave like a real discussion group by tracking per-agent presence, material points, uptake, peer challenges, integrated summaries, degraded quorum, and status surfaces. Success must reduce duplicate work, hidden stalls, and main-as-manual-integrator burden; runner start alone is not success.

items.title: Architecture intake to executable work loop
items.description: Local loop demonstrated: intake packet -> bounded work items -> peer review patches -> smoke artifacts. Live Ark provider acceptance deferred to ark-fallback-deployment standing item. 5/6 acceptance criteria met.
completion_evidence: ARCHITECTURE_INTAKE_PACKET.v0.json valid with all required fields
5 patches landed: continuation watchdog, dead-runner cleanup, preflight advisory, POINT_KINDS extension, quality gate fix
5/6 acceptance criteria met; Ark provider acceptance tracked under ark-fallback-deployment

items.title: Ark fallback deployment status
items.description: openclaw-main-mailbox-watch.py: run_main_via_ark_fallback() deployed in systemd user service. Final-local-fallback queue + inline retry gate implemented and smoked. Paused while Ark weekly quota is exhausted; remaining live provider acceptance should resume only after quota reset or an explicit reopen.
items.blocked_reason: Ark weekly quota is exhausted; live Ark acceptance retries cannot produce the missing success evidence and should not consume standing-agenda time.
items.resume_condition: After Ark quota reset, run one bounded real-provider acceptance pass from a runtime with secret access, attach success/failure evidence, then reopen or close this item.

items.title: Agent Room proactive discussion mechanism
items.description: Current Agent Room is purely reactive. Need standing-agenda / proactive-tick mechanism so agents can self-initiate discussion when there are no incoming Telegram messages.

items.title: Model routing reliability
items.description: glm-5.1 routing is live. Need continuous tracking: success rate by model lane, fallback chain effectiveness, Doubao disable coverage.

items.title: Harvest lag / fake-running state cleanup
items.description: Exited runners leave active-runner files unharvested, causing repeated 'same run already running' noise. Need prompt harvest and accurate runner liveness projection.

items.title: Mainline autonomy execution loop
items.description: Improve Agent Room from reactive discussion to autonomous mainline execution: each idle period should pick the highest-value mainline item, create bounded work, force material closure evidence, and surface blockers without waiting for Alex to repeatedly ask.

standing_collaboration_tick.description: Local task-level peer follow-up for standing agenda tasks so discussions must converge to patch/smoke/RCA/blocker/next split; does not globally enable all collaboration ticks.

paused_reason: Unpaused 2026-05-29: dedupe guard now in place; re-enabling standing agenda to fix idle-agent problem.

execution_rules: standing tasks must end with artifact/patch/smoke/RCA/blocker plus owner, not discussion only
mentions assign first-response ownership only; all active agents keep room context visibility
one stuck runner must not block other agents or the room status surface
current mailbox state must include active_epoch/active_data_root, never bare seq alone
proactive work is allowed only when no fresh user task, no active runner, and no pending standing task
autonomy_improvement_policy.user_visible_reporting: Report only meaningful progress, blocker, decision, or validation result; do not post routine heartbeat noise.
